form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 13 at this track on March 22 over 1200m, 3 len behind Absolute Heart carrying 61kg at $6.80. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at this track on September 28 over 1200m, neck behind Packing Phoenix with 61kg at $3.10. Is a definite threat in this line-up despite a bad draw.
